'''âv-w-z''' ('''kavawaz''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yowl|yowl]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-w-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yowl|yowl]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âv-w-z
|-
! Lemma
| kavawaz
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thivawaz|thivawaz]] || [[word:jivawaz|jivawaz]] || [[word:shivawaz|shivawaz]] || [[word:kivawaz|kivawaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuvawaz|thuthuvawaz]] || [[word:jujuvawaz|jujuvawaz]] || [[word:shushuvawaz|shushuvawaz]] || [[word:kukuvawaz|kukuvawaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuvawaz|thuvawaz]] || [[word:juvawaz|juvawaz]] || [[word:shuvawaz|shuvawaz]] || [[word:kuvawaz|kuvawaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuvawaz|thuvawaz]] || [[word:juvawaz|juvawaz]] || [[word:shuvawaz|shuvawaz]] || [[word:kuvawaz|kuvawaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thevawaz|thevawaz]] || [[word:jevawaz|jevawaz]] || [[word:shevawaz|shevawaz]] || [[word:kevawaz|kevawaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothovawaz|thothovawaz]] || [[word:jojovawaz|jojovawaz]] || [[word:shoshovawaz|shoshovawaz]] || [[word:kokovawaz|kokovawaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thovawaz|thovawaz]] || [[word:jovawaz|jovawaz]] || [[word:shovawaz|shovawaz]] || [[word:kovawaz|kovawaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thovawaz|thovawaz]] || [[word:jovawaz|jovawaz]] || [[word:shovawaz|shovawaz]] || [[word:kovawaz|kovawaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠvawaz|thĂŠvawaz]] || [[word:jĂŠvawaz|jĂŠvawaz]] || [[word:shĂŠvawaz|shĂŠvawaz]] || [[word:kĂŠvawaz|kĂŠvawaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathavawaz|thathavawaz]] || [[word:jajavawaz|jajavawaz]] || [[word:shashavawaz|shashavawaz]] || [[word:kakavawaz|kakavawaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thavawaz|thavawaz]] || [[word:javawaz|javawaz]] || [[word:shavawaz|shavawaz]] || [[word:kavawaz|kavawaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thavawaz|thavawaz]] || [[word:javawaz|javawaz]] || [[word:shavawaz|shavawaz]] || [[word:kavawaz|kavawaz]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shavawaz|shavawaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshavawaz|goshavawaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishavawaz|gokishavawaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shavawaznĂŒ|shavawaznĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshavawaznknĂŒ|goshavawaznknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishavawaznĂŒ|gokishavawaznĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shavawazshĂ«|shavawazshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshavawaznkshĂ«|goshavawaznkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishavawazshĂ«|gokishavawazshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavawazro|shavawazro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavawaznkro|goshavawaznkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavawazro|gokishavawazro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shavawazmu|shavawazmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavawaznkmu|goshavawaznkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavawazmu|gokishavawazmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shavawazsher|shavawazsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshavawaznksher|goshavawaznksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishavawazsher|gokishavawazsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shavawazng|shavawazng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshavawaznkng|goshavawaznkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishavawazng|gokishavawazng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shavawazya|shavawazya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshavawaznkya|goshavawaznkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishavawazya|gokishavawazya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shavawazyam|shavawazyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshavawaznkyam|goshavawaznkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishavawazyam|gokishavawazyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavawaznĂŒshĂ«|shavawaznĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavawaznknĂŒshĂ«|goshavawaznknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavawaznĂŒshĂ«|gokishavawaznĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavawaznĂŒro|shavawaznĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavawaznknĂŒro|goshavawaznknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavawaznĂŒro|gokishavawaznĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavawaznĂŒmu|shavawaznĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavawaznknĂŒmu|goshavawaznknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavawaznĂŒmu|gokishavawaznĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavawazshĂ«nĂŒ|shavawazshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavawaznkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshavawaznkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavawazshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishavawazshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavawazshĂ«ro|shavawazshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavawaznkshĂ«ro|goshavawaznkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavawazshĂ«ro|gokishavawazshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavawazshĂ«mu|shavawazshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavawaznkshĂ«mu|goshavawaznkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavawazshĂ«mu|gokishavawazshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavawazronĂŒ|shavawazronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavawaznkronĂŒ|goshavawaznkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavawazronĂŒ|gokishavawazronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavawazroshĂ«|shavawazroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavawaznkroshĂ«|goshavawaznkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavawazroshĂ«|gokishavawazroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavawazromu|shavawazromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavawaznkromu|goshavawaznkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavawazromu|gokishavawazromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavawazmunĂŒ|shavawazmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavawaznkmunĂŒ|goshavawaznkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavawazmunĂŒ|gokishavawazmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavawazmushĂ«|shavawazmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavawaznkmushĂ«|goshavawaznkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavawazmushĂ«|gokishavawazmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavawazmuro|shavawazmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavawaznkmuro|goshavawaznkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavawazmuro|gokishavawazmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
